name: Reactionary
benefit: +2 trait bonus on initiative checks.

name: Armor Expert
benefit: Reduce armor check penalty by 1 (minimum 0).

name: Bullied
benefit: +1 trait bonus on attacks of opportunity with unarmed strikes.

name: Courageous
benefit: +2 trait bonus on saving throws against fear effects.

name: Deft Dodger
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Reflex saves.

name: Dirty Fighter
benefit: +1 trait bonus on damage when flanking.

name: Fencer
benefit: +1 trait bonus on attacks of opportunity with blades.

name: Killer
benefit: Deal additional damage equal to weapon's critical hit modifier on a confirmed critical hit.

name: Resilient
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saves.

name: Anatomist
benefit: +1 trait bonus on rolls to confirm critical hits.

name: Magical Knack
benefit: +2 trait bonus to caster level (max = character level).

name: Focused Mind
benefit: +2 trait bonus on concentration checks.

name: Hedge Magician
benefit: Reduce cost of crafting magic items by 5%.

name: Magical Lineage
benefit: Pick one spell; its total level adjustment from metamagic is reduced by 1.

name: Magical Talent
benefit: Choose a 0-level spell; cast it once per day as a spell-like ability.

name: Classically Schooled
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Spellcraft checks, and Spellcraft is a class skill.

name: Dangerously Curious
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Use Magic Device checks, and UMD is a class skill.

name: Mathematical Prodigy
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) and Knowledge (engineering).

name: Self-Taught Scholar
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Linguistics checks, and it is a class skill.

name: Fast-Talker
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Bluff checks, and Bluff is a class skill.

name: Charming
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Diplomacy vs attracted creatures.

name: Child of the Streets
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Sleight of Hand checks, and it is a class skill.

name: Convincing Liar
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Intimidate checks.

name: Natural-Born Leader
benefit: +1 trait bonus on all cohort, follower, and companion morale checks.

name: Poverty-Stricken
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Survival checks, and Survival is a class skill.

name: Rich Parents
benefit: Start with 900 gp instead of normal starting gold.

name: Suspicious
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Sense Motive checks, and it is a class skill.

name: Talented
benefit: +1 trait bonus on one Perform skill, and it is a class skill.

name: Birthmark
benefit: +2 trait bonus on saving throws against charm and compulsion effects.

name: Devotee of the Green
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (nature) and Knowledge (geography).

name: Ease of Faith
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Diplomacy checks, and Diplomacy is a class skill.

name: History of Heresy
benefit: +1 trait bonus on saving throws against divine spells.

name: Indomitable Faith
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Will saves.

name: Sacred Touch
benefit: Automatically stabilize a dying creature as a standard action.

name: Scholar of the Great Beyond
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (history) and Knowledge (planes).

name: Undead Slayer
benefit: +1 trait bonus on weapon damage rolls against undead.

name: Veteran of Battle
benefit: +1 trait bonus on initiative checks, draw a weapon as a free action during surprise round.

name: Giant Slayer
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Bluff, Perception, and Sense Motive checks against giants, +1 on attack and damage against giants.

name: Hagfish Hopeful
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Fortitude saves, you've drunk the water at the Hagfish tavern in Sandpoint.

name: Merchant Family
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Appraise checks, and Appraise is a class skill. Start with extra 300 gp.

name: Monster Hunter
benefit: +1 trait bonus on attack rolls and weapon damage rolls against aberrations and magical beasts.

name: Scholar of the Ancients
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (arcana) and Knowledge (history) relating to Thassilon.

name: Student of Faith
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (religion) and Knowledge (arcana), one is always a class skill.

name: Sandpoint Local
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Knowledge (local) checks about Sandpoint, and it is a class skill.

name: Sczarni Connection
benefit: +1 trait bonus on Bluff and Intimidate checks when dealing with Sczarni.

name: Thassilonian Tattoo
benefit: +1 caster level for spells of one chosen school of magic. Must have a Thassilonian tattoo.
